nasb.text: Now then, O king, come down according to all the desire of your soul to do so; and our part shall be to surrender him into the king’s hand.”

esv.text: Now come down, O king, according to all your heart’s desire to come down, and our part shall be to surrender him into the king’s hand.”

cnv.text: 王啊，現在請下來，請你隨著你的心願下來，我們必親自把他交在王的手裡。”

ccb.text: 王啊，你随时都可以下来，我们一定把他交在王的手里。”
